name: ExtensionActorDefinition_Date
title: R5: Date last changed (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `ActorDefinition.date` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`ActorDefinition.date` 0..1 `dateTime`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
* R5 `ActorDefinition.date` 0..1 `dateTime`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `ActorDefinition.date` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `ActorDefinition` is not mapped.
Element `ActorDefinition.date` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.comment:
Element `ActorDefinition.date` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `ActorDefinition` is not mapped.
Element `ActorDefinition.date` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
The date is often not tracked until the resource is published, but may be present on draft content. Note that this is not the same as the resource last-modified-date, since the resource may be a secondary representation of the actor definition. Additional specific dates may be added as extensions or be found by consulting Provenances associated with past versions of the resource.

See guidance around (not) making local changes to elements [here](https://hl7.org/fhir/canonicalreso.html#localization).

element.definition: The date  (and optionally time) when the actor definition was last significantly changed. The date must change when the business version changes and it must change if the status code changes. In addition, it should change when the substantive content of the actor definition changes.
element.comment:
The date is often not tracked until the resource is published, but may be present on draft content. Note that this is not the same as the resource last-modified-date, since the resource may be a secondary representation of the actor definition. See guidance around (not) making local changes to elements [here](https://hl7.org/fhir/canonicalreso.html#localization).
